variables.name: EnvironmentName
variables.note: Friendly environment label written to the env_banner table and shown on the report.

variables.name: RowMultiplier
variables.note: Scales the volume of synthetic data the ETL notebook generates (Dev=1, Test=5, Prod=20).

variables.name: RefreshWindowDays
variables.note: Number of days of encounters to generate/refresh (Dev=30, Test=90, Prod=365).
